groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, aquarium_then_vehicle direction, random ordering #3.

sentences.text: The dentist's office featured a tall hexagonal tank filled with exotic lionfish and pufferfish.
The dentist's office featured a tall hexagonal tank filled with exotic lionfish and pufferfish. Maintaining a photoperiod of eight to ten hours prevents excessive algae blooms in a planted tank.

The dentist's office featured a tall hexagonal tank filled with exotic lionfish and pufferfish. Maintaining a photoperiod of eight to ten hours prevents excessive algae blooms in a planted tank. Bright neon tetras darted between the plastic plants anchored along the bottom of the tank.

The dentist's office featured a tall hexagonal tank filled with exotic lionfish and pufferfish. Maintaining a photoperiod of eight to ten hours prevents excessive algae blooms in a planted tank. Bright neon tetras darted between the plastic plants anchored along the bottom of the tank. She poured the dechlorinated water slowly into the tank so the current would not disturb the fry.

The dentist's office featured a tall hexagonal tank filled with exotic lionfish and pufferfish. Maintaining a photoperiod of eight to ten hours prevents excessive algae blooms in a planted tank. Bright neon tetras darted between the plastic plants anchored along the bottom of the tank. She poured the dechlorinated water slowly into the tank so the current would not disturb the fry. Every time we have guests over, they spend at least ten minutes staring into the tank.

The dentist's office featured a tall hexagonal tank filled with exotic lionfish and pufferfish. Maintaining a photoperiod of eight to ten hours prevents excessive algae blooms in a planted tank. Bright neon tetras darted between the plastic plants anchored along the bottom of the tank. She poured the dechlorinated water slowly into the tank so the current would not disturb the fry. Every time we have guests over, they spend at least ten minutes staring into the tank. The pet store employee scooped a goldfish from the display tank and placed it in a bag.

Every time we have guests over, they spend at least ten minutes staring into the tank. The pet store employee scooped a goldfish from the display tank and placed it in a bag. The filtration system hummed quietly behind the tank while the fish settled in for the night.
